summary: Iter-22 frontend-only end-to-end QA of Maventech Software PHP storefront + admin per main agent's request. All critical flows (regional storefronts + currency, dark mode, add-to-cart persistence, coupon MAVEN20, DEMO checkout, admin login + 16 admin tabs, AI chat lead capture, newsletter, 404 handling) PASS. No PHP fatal/parse/warning/notice errors observed on any tested page. No critical bugs found.

verification_evidence.region_switcher_widget: data-testid=currency-selector + country-opt-CA click navigated / -> /ca/shop and label updated to '🇨🇦 CAD'
verification_evidence.dark_mode_toggle: html[data-bs-theme] flips light <-> dark on toggle click
verification_evidence.add_to_cart: Click on [data-testid=add-to-cart-microsoft-office-2024-professional-plus-windows] => POST /ajax/cart.php 200; cart badge -> 1; /cart.php renders item with $209.99 line + $209.99 subtotal
verification_evidence.coupon_MAVEN20: On /checkout.php applied via [data-testid=coupon-apply] -> toast 'Coupon applied — 20% off!' + summary 'Coupon (MAVEN20 — 20% off) -$42.00' -> total $209.99 -> $167.99
verification_evidence.demo_checkout: Filled billing + dummy card (4242…) on /checkout.php and clicked [data-testid=checkout-pay-button] -> redirected to /order-success.php?order=MV2606251EBE6, success card 'Thanks for purchasing with us, Test!' with order #, payment method, total $167.99, QR receipt and license-key delivery copy
verification_evidence.admin_login: POST /login.php with admin@maventechsoftware.com / Admin@UC2026! -> 302 -> /admin.php?tab=dashboard. Dashboard renders ($378 revenue / 4 orders / 4 customers / 27 keys / 29% open rate / Conversion Funnel / Revenue Mix)

admin_tabs_status.all 16 tabs tested (dashboard, users, pr: HTTP 200, NO PHP fatal/parse/warning/notice/deprecated on any tab, NO .alert-danger

verification_evidence.ai_chat_lead_capture: Ask AI -> chat panel opens (data-testid=chat-panel). Filled lead-name/lead-email/lead-phone and clicked lead-send-btn -> POST /ajax/lead.php 200 + POST /ajax/chat-customer.php 200; bot reply 'Thanks for contacting us, Test! 📞 Please call our support line…' appended to thread; chat-lead-error not shown
verification_evidence.newsletter: Footer email -> 'Subscribed! You'll receive exclusive deals soon.' toast
verification_evidence.404_handling: Junk URL /does-not-exist.php returns 200 with stylised 404 (Home / Shop All Products / Contact Us links)
verification_evidence.console: Only benign 404 console messages for an icon resource — no JS exceptions, no PHP error markup leaked to DOM

non_issues_clarified: /register.php intentionally returns 302 -> /login.php (self-service customer registration is DISABLED by design — confirmed via /app/php-version/register.php comment). Title 'Admin Login' is expected.
/contact-us.php 404 is expected — canonical contact page is /contact.php and no internal links use /contact-us.php. Footer + 404 page + nav 'Request a Quote' all correctly point to /contact.php.
Blog list empty / individual posts 404 — per problem statement (AI auto-blogger seeds over time).

Some admin tab innerText lengths look short (~352 chars) for payment / inventory / blogger — verified visually that pages render correctly; the rest of their UI is in non-text DOM (cards / iframes / canvas) so innerText is naturally smaller. Not a bug.
action_items: OPTIONAL (UX nicety, not a bug): consider a 301 redirect /contact-us.php -> /contact.php since it's a frequently-guessed URL.

OPTIONAL (UX nicety): /register.php returns 302 to /login.php; that login form still has title 'Admin Login' which can confuse a customer who reached register.php from an external link. Either remove /register references from sitemap or send the customer to /track-order.php (the documented re-access path).
critical_code_review_comments: Country-prefix routing in php-version/router.php + .htaccess + includes/functions.php is solid — all 5 regions resolve nested paths (verified /ca/shop, /uk/checkout.php, /ca/about-us.php, /uk/contact.php). Earlier 404 regression on regional country links is fully resolved.
Currency conversion produces correct symbols (CA$, £, AU$, €, $) and rates are applied consistently to both regular and crossed-out prices in product cards and to cart/checkout/order-success totals.
DEMO checkout flow correctly bypasses real payment, creates an order with deterministic ID and reaches order-success.php with line items and licence-key copy — good UX for test-mode operators.
Admin auth + session redirect honour the `next` field correctly; admin.php?tab=* renders cleanly for every nav target with no PHP warnings.
Theme pre-paint <style> from iter-21 still works — no FOUC on dark mode across pages tested.

Minor code-quality note (not a bug): the public cart count selector uses a generic `.badge` class — testers had to disambiguate from sidebar count badges. Consider tightening the cart-count node to a single `[data-testid="cart-count"]` (was already present) and avoiding reusing `.badge` on unrelated nav items.
test_credentials: Admin admin@maventechsoftware.com / Admin@UC2026! (read from /app/memory/test_credentials.md). Coupon MAVEN20.
seed_data_creation: Created one DEMO test order #MV2606251EBE6 ($167.99, MAVEN20 applied) and one lead (Test Iter22 / test_iter22_lead@example.com / 5551234567) and one newsletter subscriber (test_iter22@example.com). Safe to leave or clean up.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Whole storefront passes E2E. The only two minor cosmetic action items are: (1) add a 301 redirect /contact-us.php -> /contact.php, (2) reconsider what /register.php does (currently 302s to admin login page which can confuse customers). Cart-add AJAX (/ajax/cart.php?action=add) does persist correctly when triggered from the actual product card button — earlier iter-21 note suggesting it didn't persist was based on a direct curl probe; via the real UI button it works (verified order placed for $167.99). Admin tabs all render; verified 16/16.
